channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Accused Washington media dinner attacker is California tutor
item.description: The man arrested is a highly educated tutor and amateur video game developer from California.

item.title: Ohio GOP governor primary shows headwinds for Ramaswamy
item.description: Few signs that the top candidate sees the race as competitive ahead of fall campaign.

item.title: Trump says DC shooting suspect left anti-Christian writings
item.description: Suspect allegedly called for targeting administration officials, president says.

item.title: Lake Superior island wolves thrive as packs prey on moose
item.description: Researchers say more wolves are roaming the remote island, feeding primarily on moose.
